name: adlc-team
description: Agentic Development Lifecycle v6 — Team edition. 3 role-based agents (BA/DEV/QA) with platform enforcement, 10 skills, GitHub Projects integration. Spec-first BDD workflow with TDD implementation, self-review at every role, QA focus on edge cases and exploratory testing. Requires companion plugins: pr-review-toolkit, commit-commands. Recommended: claude-md-management, context7, github, LSP for your stack.
